It's not energized. I don't see how it would be any different than a cellphone. Just don't call them "computer components" or the luggage checkin clerk might try and have you arrested for bringing bomb components on a plane or some stupid shit.

Just say its sensitive electronics or something idk.

Hello, I've decided to spoil myself by building my first PC. Besides the GPU, I have figured most of the parts. Which one would you recommend for 1080p 144Hz for less than 600€ ? It will be mainly for FF14, the Witcher, CyberPunk, Civ 6 and Total War Warhammer. 

Thanks in advance.
You tell me. You're replying for the sake of replying now. It's their device, they can do what they want.
